message:
🌱 Add argo-events: Argo lint should work for argo-event resources such as mission (#1032)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "argo-events-3260-argo-lint-should-work-for-argo-event-resources-such-as-eventsou",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "argo-events: Argo lint should work for argo-event resources such as EventSource and Sensor",
+    "description": "Argo lint should work for argo-event resources such as EventSource and Sensor. Requested by 7+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current argo-events deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your argo-events version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events\nhelm list -n argo-events 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working argo-events installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review argo-events configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant argo-events configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events\nkubectl get configmap -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-events\n```\nWe use the Argo CLI to lint our workflows in our development process and the CI/CD pipeline. It catches errors up front and can be a useful static debugging tool. It does not find any files to lint when given a path to an EventSource or Sensor."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Argo lint should work for argo-event resources such as…",
+        "description": "## Feat\nImplements a lint command for the Argo Events CLI to validate EventSource and Sensor YAML files before deployment, addressing the feature request in #3260.\n\nCurrently, users have no way to validate their EventSource and Sensor manifests until they deploy them to a cluster. This PR adds a lint command that performs the same validation checks the controllers use at runtime, enabling early error detection in development and CI/CD pipelines.\n\n## Motivation\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events\nkubectl get events -n argo-events --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Argo lint should work for argo-event resources such as…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## Feat\nImplements a lint command for the Argo Events CLI to validate EventSource and Sensor YAML files before deployment, addressing the feature request in #3260.\n\nCurrently, users have no way to validate their EventSource and Sensor manifests until they deploy them to a cluster.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },

+      "argo-events",

+      "Deployment"
+    ],

+    },

+  },

+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",

+      "kubectl"
+    ],
